---
title: "Thank you"
body-classes: "ed-page"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    code-tools: false
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <meta name="robots" content="noindex,nofollow">
---

```{=html}
<main class="ed">

<section class="l-hero">
  <div class="l-wrap" style="text-align:center;">
    <svg width="72" height="72" viewBox="0 0 56 56" aria-hidden="true"
         style="margin: 0 auto 1.25rem; display:block;">
      <circle cx="28" cy="28" r="25" fill="none" stroke="#16a34a" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.18"/>
      <circle cx="28" cy="28" r="25" fill="none" stroke="#16a34a" stroke-width="3"
              stroke-dasharray="157" stroke-dashoffset="157">
        <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="157" to="0" dur="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
      </circle>
      <polyline points="16,30 25,38 40,20" fill="none" stroke="#16a34a"
                stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"
                stroke-dasharray="40" stroke-dashoffset="40">
        <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="40" to="0" dur="0.5s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
      </polyline>
    </svg>
    <p class="l-eyebrow">Message received</p>
    <h1>Thanks — I got it.</h1>
    <p class="l-lede" style="margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;">
      I'll review your message and reply by email. Redirecting you home
      in <span id="ty-sec">15</span> seconds.
    </p>
    <div class="l-cta-row" style="justify-content:center;">
      <a class="l-btn" href="/">Go to homepage</a>
      <a class="l-btn l-btn--ghost" href="/content/projects/">Projects</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="l-section first">
  <div class="l-wrap">
    <div class="l-grid">
      <a class="l-card" href="/content/projects/">
        <div class="l-card-body">
          <p class="l-card-tag">Projects</p>
          <h3 class="l-card-title">Recent project work</h3>
          <p class="l-card-desc">Shiny dashboards, multivariate analyses, and applied machine learning.</p>
        </div>
      </a>
      <a class="l-card" href="/content/blog/">
        <div class="l-card-body">
          <p class="l-card-tag">Writing</p>
          <h3 class="l-card-title">Notes from the blog</h3>
          <p class="l-card-desc">Practical pieces on R, Quarto, webR, and reproducible workflows.</p>
        </div>
      </a>
      <a class="l-card" href="/content/about/">
        <div class="l-card-body">
          <p class="l-card-tag">About</p>
          <h3 class="l-card-title">A bit about me</h3>
          <p class="l-card-desc">Background, training, and how I approach data work.</p>
        </div>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<script>
  (function () {
    var target = '/';
    var secs = 15;
    var el = document.getElementById('ty-sec');
    var timer = setInterval(function () {
      secs--;
      if (el) el.textContent = String(secs);
      if (secs <= 0) {
        clearInterval(timer);
        window.location.href = target;
      }
    }, 1000);
  })();
</script>

</main>
```
